home.title: Gaetan Faucher • DevOps & Fullstack Developer | AI & MLOps
home.description: Gaëtan Faucher, freelance Fullstack & DevOps developer based in Montpellier (France), specialized in AI & MLOps. Automation, Cloud, CI/CD and integration of AI into concrete solutions.

about.title: About Gaëtan Faucher • Skills, Experience & Services
about.description: Discover the background of Gaëtan Faucher: skills (DevOps, Fullstack, AI/MLOps), professional experience, certifications and freelance services — custom development, CI/CD pipelines, containerization and AI solutions.

preambleText: Access to the gaetandev.fr site is free, with no obligation to purchase.
The gaetandev.fr site reserves the right to modify
without notice or announcement of these general conditions of sale which must
be consulted before any purchase. The user must be of legal age or

definitionsText: The services belonging to gaetandev.fr constitute all the services available at the URL https://gaetandev.fr/.
cguText: All items offered on the gaetandev.fr website remain the exclusive property of
gaetandev.fr. As such, no one has the right to sell or resell the content belonging to
gaetandev.fr without permission. Failure to comply with the conditions of use or sale may lead to

commandText: Any validated order constitutes an irrevocable acceptance of the general conditions of sale and the
payment and validate your transaction. The data recorded by gaetandev.fr constitute the proof
of all transactions made by gaetandev.fr and its customers. The data recorded by
the payment system constitutes proof of financial transactions.
paymentText: Payment is made online through Paypal.
Personal information and credit card numbers never circulate
in plain text between the browser and the server, the data is encrypted and transmitted by the SSL protocol.
retractationText: Notwithstanding article L. 121-20-2 of the French Consumer Code,
the customer no longer has the right of withdrawal
from the date and time of provision of services. By way of derogation from article
L. 121-20-1 of the French Consumer Code, the customer has a right of withdrawal of 7 (seven) days if the service has not yet been delivered.
This right of withdrawal is made by message to the email address: contact@gaetandev.fr
priceText: The rates are communicated to the customer through a quote and an invoice.
The gaetandev.fr site reserves the right to modify its prices at any time.
